meta.title: Celebrating Deep Learner Month #BeADeepLearner
meta.description:
At DeepLearning.AI, we are excited to start the new year of 2022 by celebrating the success stories from our Deep Learning Specialization learners! 

To learn more about how Deep Learning Specialization can help you build a career in AI, check out https://www.deeplearning.ai/program/deep-learning-specialization/
